name: SDR Capacity Utilization
description: Track how much of each SDR's working hours are accounted for by logged activity. Surfaces under-utilized SDRs (coverage capacity), over-utilized SDRs (burnout/quality risk), and pairs utilization with output to distinguish execution issues from healthy hustle.
alsoSurfaces: Do we have enough SDR capacity for current lead volume?
Which SDRs are at burnout-risk vs under-utilized?
Which SDRs are highly utilized but low-output (execution issue)?
How does utilization compare across teams?
beforeWeRun: Working hours per SDR per week: 40, 35, or tenant-configured?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: SDR count, team median utilization, band counts, headcount signal.

whatYoullGet.name: SDR table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable: utilization, band, time-by-type, leads handled, output ratio per SDR.

whatYoullGet.name: Utilization distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Histogram with band coloring (under-active / healthy / high / over).

whatYoullGet.name: Capacity vs output
whatYoullGet.desc: Scatter: utilization (x) vs opportunities created (y), reference line for output expectations.

whatYoullGet.name: Time breakdown
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked horizontal bar per SDR showing time-by-activity-type.

whatYoullGet.name: Team comparison
whatYoullGet.desc: Grouped bar chart comparing teams' utilization profiles.

whatYoullGet.name: Headcount signal callout
whatYoullGet.desc: Banner indicating team-level capacity strain if detected.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your capacity dashboard in ~10 min.
